intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of advanced decay. The expected specimens (P1-P4) are not visible as living botanical structures. The environment is dominated by substrate and debris.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: The white rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is absent/decomposed.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter.

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot contains only dark, possibly desiccated soil.
plant_audit.P2: Black pot contains only dark, possibly desiccated soil.
plant_audit.P3: Black pot contains the white rabbit anchor amidst soil debris; no foliage detected.
plant_audit.P4: Black pot contains only dark, possibly desiccated soil.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears uniformly dark and dry across all containers.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, crystalline or shell-like fragments on the surface of the black pots.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no significant organic matter or spills observed.

temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-1: Progressive loss of light intensity and contrast, making visual identification of any remaining organic structures impossible.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Static state; no growth or change detected in the low-light environment.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. There is no evidence of chlorophyll-bearing tissue or active growth. The specimens are effectively lost.
vision_report.anomalies: The white rabbit anchor in P3 is the only non-soil element remaining. The 'eggshell' fragments noted in the early images remain static.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit confirms a total systemic failure of the botanical collection. From the earliest image to the current state, there has been a complete absence of visible plant life. The environment is characterized by empty, soil-filled containers. The lack of light in the final images further obscures any potential for recovery, confirming the biome is currently dormant or entirely lost.
